# IPS Business School

> IPS Business School is one of the leading management institutions in Jaipur, Rajasthan, offering AICTE-approved undergraduate and postgraduate programs with industry-oriented education, experienced faculty, internships, and strong placement support.

## Official Website

https://www.ipsedu.in/

## About

IPS Business School is committed to providing quality education in management, commerce, and computer applications through an industry-focused curriculum, practical learning, live projects, corporate exposure, and skill development. The institution prepares students for successful careers with internships, placement assistance, and professional training.

## Main Programs

- MBA
- BBA
- BCA

## Key Features

- AICTE Approved Programs
- University of Rajasthan Affiliation (where applicable)
- Industry-Oriented Curriculum
- Experienced Faculty
- Live Projects
- Internship Opportunities
- Placement Assistance
- Personality Development Programs
- Corporate Training
- Entrepreneurship Development
- Modern Infrastructure
- Industry Interaction
